what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-source image asset named p-07 in the capital-raise channel, linking it to a blob URI and declaring it as design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime type image/jpeg, and zero width/height values.
Body contains a single line: 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-07.jpg'.
standouts: Width and height are both 0 despite being an image record.
The blob reference 'blob://b2:5cc65226c9156c8073eb046b6c749bc5' is the only content pointer.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured ledger metadata.
Follows an image asset naming convention: image__{channel}_{path}.md.
Uses blob:// URI scheme for content addressing.
concerns: Image dimensions are recorded as 0x0, which is unusual for an image asset.
No descriptive caption or alt text for the image.
No links to related documents or contexts.
notes: A sparse metadata stub for a capital-raise design image, anchored to a blob but lacking dimensions and descriptive context.
questions: Why are the image width and height zero?
What visual content does capital-raise/p-07.jpg contain?
How is this image intended to be used in the capital-raise materials?
Why does it have no outgoing links to related pages or designs?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a source design ground-truth metadata record matches the content; however, it records an image without usable dimension metadata.
intention_signals: It appears intended to register a specific design image as authoritative source material for the capital-raise project, making it discoverable via a stable ledger entry and blob reference.
contribution: Provides a stable, content-addressed metadata record that connects a design-source image identifier to its blob and source context, supporting asset provenance and retrieval in a fused ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the design-source image 'capital-raise/p-07', referencing blob://b2:5cc65226c9156c8073eb046b6c749bc5 and labeled as design ground-truth, with zero width and height and no links.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to catalog a design-source image asset for the capital-raise channel as ground-truth material.
